--- 
name: docker-compose-up-dev
description: A script to start the development environment using docker-compose.
argument-hint: No arguments needed. Just run the script to start the development environment.
allowed-tools: shell
--- 

# Docker Compose Up Dev Script
When ask to perform the task of starting the development environment, use the 'docker-compose-up-dev.sh' script to run the necessary docker-compose command to bring up the services defined in the `docker-compose.yml` file.
This make sure agent debug and development environment is up and running with the latest changes.
